mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm.spl_business_db (model_no, exam_time, exam_id, db_deputy, db_type) VALUES (like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, like '%'||#{examinID}||'%', like '%'||#{deputyAccountNumber}||'%',like '%'||#{dbType}||'%')

INSERT INTO hpeapm.spl_mainten_db (model_no, exam_time, exam_id, role_id) VALUES (like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, like '%'||#{examinID}||'%', like '%'||#{deputyAccountNumber}||'%')

INSERT INTO hpeapm.spl_business_dy (model_no, dy_time, exam_id, dy_deputy, pro_id) VALUES (like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, like '%'||#{examinID}||'%', like '%'||#{deputyAccountNumber}||'%',like '%'||#{proId}||'%')
mapper.select: SELECT a."busiUnitCode" AS prvd FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" a WHERE a."deputyAccountNumber" = like '%'||#{deputyAccountNumber}||'%'
SELECT b."prvd_code" AS prvd FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a LEFT JOIN hpeapm."map_bonc_gl" b ON a."dock_dept" = b."prvd_jc" WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'

SELECT CASE WHEN a.busiUnitCode = 'CM000' THEN '集团公司' ELSE b.org_name END AS prvd FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_userinfos a LEFT JOIN hpmgr.bonc_cmwa_prvd b ON a.busiUnitCode = b.org_code WHERE a.userName = like '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%' LIKE '%' || REPLACE(b.org_name, '公司', '') || '%'
LIMIT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN a.busiUnitCode = 'CM000' THEN '集团公司' ELSE b.org_name END AS prvd FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_userinfos a LEFT JOIN hpmgr.bonc_cmwa_prvd b ON a.busiUnitCode = b.org_code WHERE a.userName = like '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%' LIKE '%' || REPLACE(b.org_name, '公司', '') || '%' LIMIT 1

SELECT aa.busiUnitCode, aa.provinceName, aa.orgCode, aa.orgName FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_orginfos aa WHERE 1 = 1
AND aa.orgName LIKE '%' || like '%'||#{orgName}||'%' || '%'
AND like '%'||#{prvdName}||'%' LIKE '%' || REPLACE(REPLACE(aa.provinceName, '公司', ''), '总部', '') || '%' LIMIT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN a.busiUnitCode = 'CM000' THEN '集团公司' ELSE b.org_name END AS prvd, a.userName, a.userMobile, a.deputyAccountNumber FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_userinfos a LEFT JOIN hpmgr.bonc_cmwa_prvd b ON a.busiUnitCode = b.org_code WHERE a.userName = like '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%' LIKE '%' || REPLACE(b.org_name, '公司', '') || '%'
LIMIT 1

SELECT d."deputyAccountNumber" AS "value", d."userName" AS "label" FROM hpeapm."map_role_mapping" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_user_role_info" b ON a."bonc_role" = b."role_name" LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" d ON b."deputy_accountNumber" = d."deputyAccountNumber" WHERE a."map_role" = like '%'||#{roleName}||'%' AND d."busiUnitCode" = like '%'||#{prvd}||'%' and d."deputyAccountNumber" is not null
SELECT a."def_exam_userDept" AS defaultUser FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT a."def_exam_userDept" AS defaultUserDepy, a."def_exam_user" AS defaultUser FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT a."def2_exam_userdepy" AS default2UserDepy, a."def2_exam_user" AS default2User FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'

SELECT a."def_exam_userDept" AS defaultUserDepy, a."def_exam_user" AS defaultUser, a."def2_exam_user" default2User, a."def2_exam_userdepy" default2UserDepy, a."share_user" AS shareUser, a."share_user_depy" AS shareUserDepy FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT a."deputyAccountNumber" AS deputy FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" a WHERE a."userName" = like '%'||#{userName}||'%' LIMIT 1
SELECT a."userName" AS userName, a."deputyAccountNumber" AS deputy FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" a WHERE deputyAccountNumber = like '%'||#{defExamUser}||'%'

SELECT c."deputyAccountNumber" AS "deputyAccountNumber" FROM hpeapm."map_role_mapping" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_user_role_info" b ON a."bonc_role" = b."role_name" LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" c ON b."deputy_accountNumber" = c."deputyAccountNumber" WHERE c."deputyAccountNumber" IS NOT NULL and a."map_role" IN
like '%'||#{role}||'%'
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm."spl_business_db" a SET a."is_del" = '0' WHERE 1=1
AND a."model_no" =like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
AND a."db_id"=like '%'||#{id}||'%'
AND a."exam_id"=like '%'||#{examinID}||'%'

UPDATE hpeapm."spl_business_dy" a SET a."is_del" = '0' WHERE 1=1
AND a."model_no" =like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
AND a."dy_id"=like '%'||#{id}||'%'
AND a."exam_id"=like '%'||#{examinID}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT a."sub_depy" AS subDepy FROM hpeapm."spl_business_examine" a WHERE id = like '%'||#{examinID}||'%'

SELECT a."db_id" AS dbId, b.id AS examId, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.submit_user AS submitUser, b.sub_depy AS submitUserDepy, b.submit_time AS writeTime, b.submit_remarks AS submitRemarks, b.examine_user AS examineUser, b.exam_depy AS examineUserDepy, b.examine_dept AS examineUserDept, b.examine_time AS examineTime, b.examine_type AS examineType, b.examine_result AS examineResult, b.workItem_Id as workId, b.examine_category AS examineCategory, b.now_category AS nowCategoty FROM hpeapm."spl_business_db" a LEFT JOIN hpeapm."spl_business_examine" b ON a."exam_id" = b."id" WHERE a.db_id IN
like '%'||#{id}||'%'
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm."spl_business_db" a SET a."exam_remarks" = like '%'||#{remarks}||'%' WHERE a."db_id" in
like '%'||#{id}||'%'

UPDATE hpeapm."spl_business_dy" a SET a."dy_remarks"=like '%'||#{remarks}||'%', a."is_del"='0' WHERE a."dy_id" in
like '%'||#{id}||'%'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM hpeapm."spl_business_db" WHERE is_del = '0' AND db_id IN
like '%'||#{id}||'%'

SELECT pro_id FROM hpeapm."spl_business_dy" WHERE is_del = '1' AND pro_id IS NOT NULL AND dy_id IN
like '%'||#{id}||'%'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM hpeapm."spl_business_dy" WHERE is_del = '0' AND dy_id IN
like '%'||#{id}||'%'
